title: Python 3 Migration and Architectural Refactor (v0.2.0)
body_summary: This PR completes the migration of PyStormTracker to modern Python 3 standards. ### Key Changes: - **Python 3 & Type Hinting**: Fully migrated from Python 2; added comprehensive type hints verified by mypy and uff. - **Library Migration**: Switched from deprecated PyNIO to etCDF4.
